programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a foolproof preparation for pork chops with vinegar and peppers—a modern version tangy and juicy enough to rival that prepared by an Italian grandmother. Next, we turn to pan-roasted pork tenderloin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tuna, which is often served rare to medium-rare, can be particularly tricky to get just right with a nicely seared crust. As for halibut, we developed a technique that ensured perfect texture without a loss of flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some people are intimidated by the thought of preparing fish. Traditional dishes, like Fish Meunière, can seem even more daunting. But you don't need to be wearing a toque to prepare this French classic well.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most Italian recipes seem startlingly easy to prepare, requiring just a few simple ingredients. But some dishes need special care to reach their full potential. In this episode, we demystify two Italian classics: Fettuccine Alfredo and Beef in Barolo.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare an Indian-inspired shrimp curry and a Thai-inspired green curry with chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When you eat chicken frequently, it pays to have a number of preparations on hand. In this episode, we turn to orange-flavored chicken and chicken teriyaki.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: One of our favorite Spanish dishes is paella. But with a lengthy ingredient list the shopping alone can give the home cook pause. We take a hard look at paella to see if we can pare back this dish to its humble origins without losing its alluring flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to develop a hassle-free pizza recipe especially for the grill—one we hope will become a new backyard barbecue favorite.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: If you're a fan of saucy barbecued chicken, you'll love pulled chicken. Similar to the more traditional pulled pork, it's simply tender shreds of smoky grilled chicken moistened with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Summer desserts are all about fruit. As inviting as a bowl of sweet berries can be, there's something about baked fruit desserts that we can't resist. In this episode we take a look at two summer favorites: blueberry cobbler and free-form fruit tart.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes host Julia Collin Davison Grilled Jerk Chicken. Equipment expert Adam Ried reviews grill brushes. Christie Morrison makes Smoked Chicken Wings.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie Morrison and host Julia Collin Davison make Pork Carnitas. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Bridget Lancaster to a tasting of lard. Julia makes Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie Morrison makes host Bridget Lancaster iconic Sliders. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of ketchup. Bryan Roof makes Julia Croque Monsieur.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes Julia Collin Davison Greek Chicken. Jack Bishop challenges Bridget Lancaster to a tasting of crumbled feta, and Adam Ried reviews liquid measuring cups. Lawman Johnson makes Crushed Red Potatoes with Garlic & Herbs.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Hosts Julia Collin Davison and Bridget Lancaster make Cheesy Stuffed Shells. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for 13 by 9-inch broiler-safe baking dishes. Bryan Roof makes Julia Eggplant Pecorino.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes host Bridget Lancaster One-Batch Fried Chicken. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of strawberry spreads. Christie Morrison makes North Carolina Cheese Biscuits.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to make a meatloaf with well-seasoned meat and just enough binder to give the loaf a tender, not tough, texture. In choosing a side dish to partner with our meatloaf, we turned to another old-fashioned dish—skillet-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dinners prepared entirely in one skillet are perfect for weeknight cooking. Less cleanup is one obvious benefit. A skillet also gives the cook a bit more control over cooking multiple elements.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef, beer, and onions have a natural affinity—it's one reason burgers and onion rings are often on bar menus. In a carbonnade, the beef melds with the soft sweetness of sliced onions in a lightly thickened broth that is rich, deep, and satisfying.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted a streamlined version of roast chicken with plenty of stuffing to go around. First, we needed to solve the problem of cooking the stuffing to a safe temperature without drying out the delicate breast meat of the chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta

programme.desc: Valentina and Alicia zero in on Rocky; Rocky questions where Shannon's allegiances lie.

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Tradewinds bar could shut down for good if Jon can't get a lazy stepson to step into his new role as manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When an old-school Memphis, TN, cigar shop owner opens an adjacent cocktail bar and hires his son as manager, the bar quickly becomes an afterthought.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An inexperienced bar owner calls on Jon after hiring a hard-partying manager with no industry knowledge to run Broadway Club in Tooele, Utah.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A juvenile name and bad reputation threaten the Fort Bragg-adjacent bar Cliques, and Jon will have to put the staff through bar boot camp to save it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon steps in to help two brothers whose ill-conceived idea for a death-metal concert bar has drained their parents' retirement fund.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The hippie-dippie owner of a Chicago music venue is more concerned with the spirit of wonderment than appealing to her trendy community, so Jon introduces some tough love.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A raccoon infestation is only the most extreme on a long list of problems plaguing KC's Bar & Grill and its checked-out owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon arrives in the nick of time to save Sidelines, a family-operated sports bar being run into the ground by a violent father.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to San Antonio to help a "cool mom" owner stop partying and start running her business like a professional.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After convincing his friends to invest their life savings, the rookie bar owner of Cirivello's has turned a community staple into a money pit and now faces a hostile takeover.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon schools the clueless owner of Grinders, whose unauthorized and unsafe renovation has the city threatening to shut the place down.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After suffering a stroke, the owner of Desi Romano's Sports Bar & Grill risks losing his family legacy if Jon can't help him bounce back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get an overly-emotional bar owner to stop wallowing and take action to save his bar.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Dublin as Irish fan-favorite Brian Moore meets undefeated rising sensation, AJ McKee. Baby Slice returns to the cage, and Conor McGregor’s training partner Charlie Ward battles John Redmond in a fight sure to provide fireworks!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator is back with featherweight action as world champion Julia Budd puts her title on the line in a grudge rematch against Australian Arlene Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Italy with a huge middleweight world title fight. Local hero Alessio Sakara will have the crowd on his side as he looks to dethrone current champion Rafael Carvalho, who comes in riding a six fight Bellator win streak of his own.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator brings the fight action from Newcastle, UK, as two newly inked superstars make their Bellator debuts. Both Valérie Létourneau and Michael McDonald will look for statement wins in the Bellator cage as they aim to send a message to their rivals.

programme.title: Bellator 192: Rampage vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over The Forum with a highly anticipated showdown between “The American Gangster” Chael Sonnen and Rampage Jackson. Also, Douglas Lima and Rory MacDonald clash for the welterweight belt and Michael Chandler collides with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Pechanga Resort and Casino with a contender showdown as Lorenz Larkin takes on Fernando Gonzalez. Plus Saad Awad looks to keep his hot streak alive against J .J. Ambrose. And AJ Matthews goes to war when he faces Kendall Grove!

programme.title: Bellator 194: Nelson vs Mitrione
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with heavyweight grand prix action, as Matt Mitrione and Roy "Big Country" Nelson go to battle with each man looking to advance to the semi finals. Also on the card, KO artist Patricky Pitbull and Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his interview with Heather & Brian, feuding parents over 15-yr-old son Brandon's death. Hear from Brandon's friends, the last to see him alive and two of the young men make shocking allegations against Heather. How does she respond?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christi says she was an Emmy-winning TV news reporter at the top of her career, but now her struggle with alcohol has left her jobless, homeless and estranged from her two adult daughters. Christi faces her girls for the first time in more than two years.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's Ask Dr. Phil day. Is it an attractive woman's responsibility to tone down her looks on the job? Debrahlee made headlines saying she was fired for being too pretty. She says she was told her figure, pencil skirts & 3-inch heels were too distracting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Samantha & sister Sarah say mom, Stacy, is a successful teacher & behaviorist, but when it comes to 33-year-old brother, Ben, it's another story. Stacy says teaching Ben how to pay bills and to eat his veggies helps Ben. Ben says he's just stuck in a rut.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Summer Wells, 5, vanished from her Tennessee home, June 15, 2021. Parents Don & Candus claim abduction; online bullies say the opposite. Don & Candus meet with Scott Rouse & Greg Hartley, body language experts who work with the FBI, police and military.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Warren Jeffs, leader of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints & self-proclaimed prophet, was on the FBI's 10 Most Wanted Fugitives for unlawful flight & sexual conduct with a minor. Dr. Phil talks with FLDS member Willie Jessop.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie insists her teen daughter's behavior is the root cause of her family's dysfunction, not Jonah, her drug & alcohol-addicted husband. Dr. Phil presents Cassie with a difficult choice: pick your children or pick your husband. What will Cassie decide?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jana & Allen say neighbors Maritha & Melanie moved into the neighborhood: police reports, DFS, threats & their 4 dogs bark all hours of the night! Maritha & Melanie point to Jana & Allen, with Melanie being charged with misconduct for mooning a neighbor!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin & Daniel, both want custody of daughters, Dani, 14, & Zoey, 12, who've been torn between both parents for years. What will happen to Dani and Zoey? Find out as we meet the whole family,to see if they are ready to receive help and move forward.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dan & Teresa say identical twin sons, Dallas & Drew, 16, are violent, destructive & dangerous. What's at the root of the teens' anger & extreme jealousy? Dr. Phil examines the jealousy & torment driving these siblings apart & throwing the home into chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Have you ever looked in the mirror and thought, "If I could lose five more pounds, I'd be perfect"? Darlene and Jennifer have been starving themselves in the name of perfection, but are they also killing themselves on their quest?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shelby wants to find the truth about her dad's online relationship with a woman he's never met. Dad David says "Maria" has a $10 million inheritance and says he knows for a fact that "Maria" is a real person and he can't wait to introduce her one day.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed "fat guy" Eric was 560 lbs, so he decided to go on an epic bike ride across America. His goals were to lose weight, write a book & repair his relationship with his wife. His story went viral, as critics said Eric was scamming America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the family of Amy, "Mother God", who says she can heal the world with her group, Love Has Won. The family alleges that Amy is a brainwashed "cult leader" and she is putting other people's lives at risk. Pt. 2

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro becomes a Hugh Hefner wannabe when he discovers some Playpen magazines in Mr. Drysdale's garage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny remains eager to get Elly to the altar and decides Professor Biddle, Miss Jane's friend, will do. Mr. Drysdale blackmails Dash into asking the Clampett lass for a date. The meek birdwatcher and the handsome actor are soon at odds.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E004) Brandon wins the election, but Josh's death hangs heavy on him. Alex tells Brandon he's contesting the election, using Josh's death as leverage to unseat Brandon.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E005) Where there's smoke, there's fire, in Kelly's opinion... at least where Valerie is concerned.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E006) The President of Selanesia visits California University to receive cancer treatment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E007) When the fire marshal shuts down the After Dark for violating capacity, Steve suggests purchasing the space next door.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E008) Dylan's desperation becomes obvious to all when he takes out his gun and shoots up his living room.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E009) Dylan's closest friends stage an intervention at Casa Walsh, where they beg him to enter rehab.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E010) As Dylan lies in a coma fighting for his life, he experiences a number of bizarre dreams involving Erica, his drug dealer, and his dead father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E011) The campus erupts in controversy when an accused anti-Semite is asked to give a speaking engagement at the school.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E013) Emily Valentine returns to Beverly Hills hoping to reunite with Brandon, and even his devotion to Kelly can't dampen the sparks that still burn between them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E014) The courts decide on a punishment for Steve, whose illegal rave resulted in the fire that almost took two lives.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E015) After reading Erica's plea for help, Dylan leaps into action and hires a private investigator to help him track down her kidnappers.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E016) While working off his community service Steve meets a victim of Alzheimer's Disease, whose life story inspires Steve to make the most of his own.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E017) A motorcycle road trip inadvertently leads Brandon and Dylan to an ancient Native American ceremony where the two friends learn valuable lessons.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E018) Dylan and Valerie fly to Mexico, where they hope to rescue Erica and reclaim Dylan's inheritance.

programme.desc: Nicole takes charge of Laura's mysterious case, Doug wrestles with his demons, and Vanessa and Joey forge a risky pact.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La Directora Shepard toma un riesgo absoluto al encontrarse a solas con un informante que tenía información sobre Le Grenouille, pero en encuentro sale mal y el contacto es asesinado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan el asesinato de un contramaestre que aparece inadvertidamente en una fotografía tomada de forma casual por un fotógrafo ciego.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs ignora el pepeleo burocrático asociado a su posición como director activo y lidera la investigación del una víctima de asesinato encontrada en un taxi que se dirigía al cuartel general de NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras que la directora de NCIS vuelve de un controversial viaje Europeo y Gibbs y sus agentes se preparan para polígrafos por la Seguridad Nacional, secretos ocultos del equipo salen a la luz.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny se encarga de un caso personal que involucra a un miembro del cartel de la droga, Louis Delgado, quien Danny cree que es responsable por incendiar su casa. Erin es ascendida en la oficina del fiscal, pero se encuentra en una situación difícil.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Gormley busca ayuda de Danny y Baez para localizar a un ex detective de la policía de Nueva York que puede ser una amenaza para la seguridad de Frank.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny investiga un caso que involucra a una mujer que le disparó a su marido cuando estuvo borracha. Los instintos de Danny le dicen que hay más detrás de la historia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York experiencia un gran apagón, los policías se esfuerzan a contener el caos. Frank después descubre algunas verdades desagradables sobre su departamento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamado a Kansas para investigar una serie de asesinatos, una reunión tensa comienza entre Blake y su padre, un capitán de policía retirado, y su hermano, un detective, y deben trabajar juntos para ayudar a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit-and-run death of a little girl.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. Meanwhile, Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI investigan de primera mano los entresijos del Cirque du Soleil para determinar qué pudo contribuir a la prematura muerte de una joven bailarina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom se siente fascinado cuando cada detalle de una miniatura es idéntico al de la escena de un crimen real, y se pone manos a la obra para intentar resolver el caso utilizando las pistas proporcionadas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre inocente es brutalmente atacado y golpeado hasta la muerte por lo que parece un monstruo con una capa negra, los CSI son llamados para investigar, sólo para enterarse de que un ataque similar tuvo lugar minutos después.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer muerta aparece colgada de una cruz en el interior de una iglesia, el equipo sigue las pruebas para descubrir un extraño triángulo amoroso que se remonta a los días de instituto de la víctima.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se denuncia la desaparición de dos niños, el principal sospechoso es un conocido delincuente sexual del barrio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de una anciana, Grissom recibe una réplica en miniatura de la escena del crimen; Greg asiste a una vista para determinar su culpabilidad en la muerte accidental de un adolescente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos gemelas idénticas aparecen muertas, las pruebas en ambos casos no demuestran inmediatamente una conexión entre las dos muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos en Las Vegas que podrían estar relacionados con un infame jefe de la mafia de los años 70 que desapareció hace muchos años.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando los CSI procesan pistas tras un asesinato en una planta de fabricación de aves de corral, las pruebas les conducen a la casa de un hombre que colecciona trenes en miniatura y otra parafernalia en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El testimonio de Catherine ante el tribunal no es suficiente para condenar a un asesino sospechoso de asesinar a su propia madre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso del sonado asesinato del asambleísta Danilo Zamesca es Thomas Simon, el mayor proveedor de drogas de la costa oeste.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Catherine y Keppler comienzan a investigar el asesinato de una desconocida adolescente, ambos coinciden en que el asesino, que fue meticuloso a la hora de eliminar pruebas del cadáver y sus alrededores, es probablemente reincidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un caso relacionado con el cadáver calcinado de un hombre cuyos huesos y tejidos habían sido extraídos lleva a Nick y Keppler al inquietante mundo de la venta ilegal de partes de cuerpos humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom regresa de su año sabático como profesor mientras el nuevo miembro del equipo Michael Keppler intenta desesperadamente mantener su oscuro pasado oculto a sus colegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s club scene turns deadly when underage drinking sparks a bloody murder in a bathroom stall, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A jury field trip to the scene of a murder flips the legal tables when the defendant ends up dead and the twelve jurors become the prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A “Speed Dating” night for Miami singles turns deadly for one South Beach stud who finds himself on the wrong end of a tire iron.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach is evacuated for a tsunami, but the CSI team remains after discovering a bank robbery plot while investigating a seemingly random murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A string of dead bodies, found off the coast of Miami, turns out to be the work of modern-day pirates. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An innocent man is killed when someone falls on him from a balcony. The CSI team is lead into the center of a high-level sex and murder scandal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly random carjacking turns out to be anything but when a young woman's gambling addiction becomes more than the family business can support.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hospital emergency room shootout investigation puts the CSI team in the middle of a murder case involving the leader of a prominent street gang

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop ends in the murder of a patrolman. The CSI team must sort out a young girl's obsessive love affair in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A "Friction Party" at a private suite in one of the city's hotels accommodating hundreds of cruise passengers leaves a young woman dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?"

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a small jet crashes into a residential neighborhood, the wreckage reveals a corpse in the cargo hold, along with a half-million dollars in cash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI hace un descubrimiento impactante sobre su víctima de asesinato, mientras Horatio intenta salvar a su hijo de la conducta errática de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una azafata es asesinada en vuelo, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren todos los trapos sucios de los viajes en avión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una violación de domicilio se vuelve mucho más que eso cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren que son el blanco de la mafia rusa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la vida de un niño inocente está en peligro, Ryan, a la larga, se ve obligado a traicionar a Horatio Caine y al resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un caso de asesinato que involucra cirugía plástica extrema conduce a Horatio Caine hasta Ron Saris, que está vivo y busca vengarse de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una estrella de telerrealidad es asesinada, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se adentran en el mundo escandaloso y sensual de un programa de televisión de citas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI trabajan para averiguar por qué una familia aparentemente normal fue blanco de un brutal ataque con granadas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el caso de un hombre hervido vivo, Julia se descontrola y uno de los secretos más oscuros del equipo sale a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio lucha para salvar a Yelina y cuando Delko se opone a la súplica de Calleigh y ayuda a su peligroso padre, su vida corre peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Mientras la vida de Delko pende de un hilo, Horatio vuelve 12 años en el tiempo para revelar cómo se conocieron y se convirtieron en un equipo los CSI de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando atacan el laboratorio, Horatio debe atender la única solicitud de un hombre armado para salvar a cinco rehenes, incluido el nuevo CSI Jesse Cardoza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tres jugadores de vóleibol caen muertos misteriosamente en la cancha mientras el testimonio de Calleigh contra Delko amenaza su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hombre más odiado de Miami es asesinado, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI van a la caza de su asesino y su tesoro escondido.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods y Eric Delko regresan para ayudar a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI a detener un brote viral mortal en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A bank robbery has Mac doing crime investigation from inside to help the robber prove he didn’t kill one of the hostages.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The bank robbery saga from last season continues as Mac seeks revenge after nearly being killed by the mysterious Joe.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A free street concert quickly turns into a crime scene, the victim, in this case, has been mysteriously plagued with radiation.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios

programme.title: Jesus, Maria y Jose

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada

programme.desc: Azusa receives an invitation from Beelzebub to attend a ceremony in the land of the demons; itseems she earned a favorable reputation with the demons after stopping the conflict between the two Dragon clans in Laika's homeland.

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes for 300 Years and Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: Halkara's knack for inadvertently causing trouble led her to knock out the Demon King Pecora, and now she's locked in a dungeon.

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes for 300 Years and Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: As Laika and Flatorte bicker with hungry bellies, Natalie from the guild arrives and tells them about a quest to get rid of a massive number of longhammer boars.

programme.title: Scarlet Nexus
programme.desc: With Kasane's powers gone, Karen is ready to target Yuito; the platoon works out a strategy.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un joven bombero murió de lo que parecía ser una enfermedad cardíaca grave pero no diagnosticada, su familia y amigos quedaron devastados, pero no tenían pruebas de algún juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La hija de Paul Gruber sospechaba que algo malo estaba ocurriendo cuando recibió unas tarjetas de regalo enviadas de parte de su padre, pero escritas con la letra de una persona extraña.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, los cadáveres de Joan Rogers y sus dos hijas adolescentes fueron encontrados flotando en la Bahía de Tampa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres desaparecieron y luego fueron encontradas brutalmente asesinadas, la policía se preguntó si fueron víctimas de un crimen de odio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, cuando un paciente muere inesperadamente en el consultorio del neurólogo de California, Richard Boggs, la policía comienza lo que creen que será una investigación de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Cómo pudo el acosador obtener el código del sistema de seguridad del hogar de la víctima? ¿Cómo pudo robar sus fotografías personales? La policía necesitaba respuestas y las encontraron en el lugar más extraño.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una estudiante de último año de la universidad fue violada y asesinada cerca de un sendero sin pavimentar utilizado por los estudiantes para caminar de un lado del campus al otro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Alianza nefasta
programme.desc: Cuando una joven desapareció, la policía temió que fuera la última víctima de una serie de crímenes similares.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Katie is a mixture of nerves and excitement as the moment she has trained for is here. She’s trying out for the National soccer team. But Katie’s dreams come crashing down when an injured knee threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.desc: The TARDIS flies into the Mandragora Helix, an alien energy in space.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive klee kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chichuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.desc: Successfully proving Blake and Alexis dishonorable, Ben is given control of the South China Sea leases; Steven attempts to uncover Adam's secret; Dominique's wedding day approaches; Sammy Jo and Clay find romance by candlelight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis's life is spared as Krystle is able to restrain Blake's lethal temper; as La Mirage burns, Amanda is rescued by a mysterious stranger; Claudia is claimed victim by the ravaging flames.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An incensed Blake discovers the morning headlines accusing him of murder and arson; Adam offers his loyalties to Alexis and Colbyco; Alexis acquires enough stock to assume control of Denver-Carrington.

programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's trip to Caracas to free Caress proves unsuccessful; Dex's proposal of marriage to Alexis is rejected; Blake catches Michael Culhane and Amanda in a passionate embrace and immediately fires the promiscuous chauffeur.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Dex's plan to free Caress from prison succeeds, as she returns to Denver with a fever for revenge; Sammy Jo is pregnant with Clay's baby and warns Steven no court would deny her custody of Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Caress vows retribution for her years of imprisonment; Michael Culhane uses Zach Powers to acquire thirty percent of "The Crater" project; Sammy Jo tells a distraught Clay of her pregnancy; Caress blackmails Emily Falimont.

programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.desc: A dying Emily begs Blake to use the letter she wrote to bring an end to Alexis and Ben's treachery; Clay and Sammy Jo are married, Nick Kimball relentlessly pursues Dominique's affections; Blake rejects Michael Culhane's efforts for a reconciliation.

programme.title: Clash
programme.desc: Trinh, a mercenary, must complete a series of organized crime jobs for her boss in order to win the release of her kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Ninja Storm
